responseMessageContents.text: The owner wants Autonomous mode synced 100% with the IVX IA chat room, then put live with proof. Let me check the chat room integration — the autonomous-mode has stages (owner_chat → router → gate → executor → tests → proof), but the IVX IA chat room (the owner-ai stream / public-chat) needs to actually invoke autonomous mode. Let me check the chat intent router and the owner-ai stream to see if autonomous mode is wired in.

output.content:
1|/**
     2| * IVX Chat — Unified 5-Branch Intent Router.
     3| *
     4| * Single source of truth for classifying an inbound chat message into exactly
     5| * one of the five execution branches the IVX Chat → Intent Router diagram
     6| * defines:
     7| *
     8| *   1. general_ai          — generic conversational / informational answer
     9| *   2. developer_executor  — code/deploy/fix/audit → Senior Developer runtime
    10| *   3. owner_actions       — sign-in, sign-out, owner-gated tool actions
    11| *   4. autonomous_jobs     — daily improvement, opportunity scan, best-investor
    12| *   5. business_modules    — deal review, landing inspection, live grounding,
    13| *                            supabase inspection, owner-room data
    14| *
    15| * Why this exists: the Owner AI path (`/api/ivx/owner-ai`) routed via a long
    16| * chain of independent `if` blocks spread across an 8000-line file, and the
    17| * public chat path (`/public/chat`) had NO intent router at all — every
    18| * message went straight to a generic LLM call with no developer executor,
    19| * business module, or autonomous-job routing. This module gives both paths a
    20| * single deterministic classifier so routing is auditable and identical.
    21| *
    22| * Pure — no I/O, no AI, fully unit-testable. The caller is responsible for
    23| * executing the branch; this module only decides which branch runs.
    24| */
    25|
    26|import {
    27|  asksForBestOpportunity,
    28|  asksForBugReview,
    29|  asksForCodeRetrieval,
    30|  asksForDealReview,
    31|  asksToFindBestInvestor,
    32|  asksToGenerate3DModel,
    33|  asksToImproveIVXToday,
    34|  buildIVXOwnerAIPlannerDecision,
    35|  demandsExecutionProofNotNarrative,
    36|  isOwnerExecutionOrTaskBlock,
    37|  isRemovalExecutionPrompt,
    38|  resolveLandingInspectionIntent,
    39|  resolveLiveGroundingIntent,
    40|  resolveMediaAnalysisIntent,
    41|  resolveMultimodalRouting,
    42|  resolveOwnerLocationClarificationIntent,
    43|  shouldUseCurrentTimeTool,
    44|  targetsOwnSystemBuild,
    45|  type MultimodalRoutingKind,
    46|} from './ivx-owner-ai-intent-router';
    47|
    48|/**
    49| * Local manual-answer detector (mirrors the private helper in
    50| * `ivx-owner-ai.ts`). Returns true when the owner EXPLICITLY opts out of tools
    51| * ("no tools", "manual answer", "plain text", etc.). Kept local to avoid a
    52| * circular import with the 8000-line owner-ai API file.
    53| */
    54|function hasManualAnswerDirective(value: string): boolean {
    55|  const text = normalize(value);
    56|  if (!text) return false;
    57|  return /\b(no\s+tools?|without\s+tools?|manual\s+answer|answer\s+manually|plain\s+text|do\s+not\s+(?:use\s+tools?|inspect)|don'?t\s+(?:use\s+tools?|inspect)|dont\s+(?:use\s+tools?|inspect))\b/.test(text)
    58|    || /\b(no|without|skip)\s+(?:supabase\s+)?schema\s+inspection\b/.test(text)
    59|    || /\bno\s+unrelated\s+audits?\b/.test(text)
    60|    || /\bproduction[-\s]?runtime\s+test\s+only\b/.test(text);
    61|}
    62|
    63|/**
    64| * Local owner-backend-command detector (mirrors the private helper in
    65| * `ivx-owner-ai.ts`). Detects the documented `/time-now`, `/supabase-tables`,
    66| * etc. slash-command prefixes. Returns the command slug or null.
    67| */
    68|const OWNER_BACKEND_COMMAND_SLUGS: readonly string[] = [
    69|  '/time-now',
    70|  '/room-status',
    71|  '/supabase-tables',
    72|  '/storage-diagnostics',
    73|  '/knowledge-reindex',
    74|  '/inbox-diagnostics',
    75|  '/create-record',
    76|  '/update-record',
    77|  '/delete-record',
    78|  '/run-query',
    79|  '/upload-file',
    80|  '/read-file',
    81|];
    82|function resolveOwnerBackendCommandLocal(prompt: string): string | null {
    83|  const normalized = prompt.trim().toLowerCase();
    84|  const firstToken = normalized.split(/\s+/)[0] ?? '';
    85|  if (OWNER_BACKEND_COMMAND_SLUGS.includes(firstToken)) {
    86|    return firstToken;
    87|  }
    88|  if (shouldUseCurrentTimeTool(prompt)) {
    89|    return '/time-now';
    90|  }
    91|  return null;
    92|}
    93|
    94|/** The five execution branches. Exactly one is selected per message. */
    95|export type IVXChatBranch =
    96|  | 'general_ai'
    97|  | 'developer_executor'
    98|  | 'owner_actions'
    99|  | 'autonomous_jobs'
   100|  | 'business_modules';
   101|
   102|export type IVXChatIntent =
   103|  // general_ai
   104|  | 'normal_question'
   105|  | 'long_structured_response'
   106|  | 'multi_step_task'
   107|  | 'app_build_planning'
   108|  | 'media_analysis'
   109|  | 'location_clarification'
   110|  | 'time_query'
   111|  // developer_executor
   112|  | 'self_developer_execution'
   113|  | 'removal_execution'
   114|  | 'demands_execution_proof'
   115|  | 'code_retrieval'
   116|  | 'bug_review'
   117|  | 'media_generation_3d'
   118|  // owner_actions
   119|  | 'owner_sign_in'
   120|  | 'owner_sign_out'
   121|  | 'owner_backend_command'
   122|  | 'manual_answer'
   123|  | 'supabase_owner_action'
   124|  | 'supabase_inspection'
   125|  | 'owner_room_data'
   126|  // autonomous_jobs
   127|  | 'daily_self_improvement'
   128|  | 'opportunity_scan'
   129|  | 'best_investor_workflow'
   130|  // business_modules
   131|  | 'deal_review'
   132|  | 'landing_inspection'
   133|  | 'live_project_state';
   134|
   135|export type IVXChatRouteDecision = {
   136|  branch: IVXChatBranch;
   137|  intent: IVXChatIntent;
   138|  /** True when the branch requires a verified owner session before executing. */
   139|  requiresOwnerSession: boolean;
   140|  /** True when the branch is allowed to execute real side effects (deploy, mutate). */
   141|  mayExecuteSideEffects: boolean;
   142|  /** Optional hint for the executor (e.g. tool name, command slug). */
   143|  hint: string | null;
   144|  /** Human-readable reason for the routing decision (for audit logs). */
   145|  reason: string;
   146|  /** Original planner decision, preserved for downstream token-budget / gating logic. */
   147|  planner: ReturnType<typeof buildIVXOwnerAIPlannerDecision>;
   148|  /** Multimodal routing decision when image attachments are present. */
   149|  multimodal: MultimodalRoutingKind | null;
   150|};
   151|
   152|function normalize(value: string): string {
   153|  return value.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');
   154|}
   155|
   156|const OWNER_SIGN_IN_PATTERNS: RegExp[] = [
   157|  /\bsign\s+in\b/i,
   158|  /\blog\s+in\b/i,
   159|  /\blogin\b/i,
   160|  /\bowner\s+login\b/i,
   161|  /\bauthenticate\b/i,
   162|  /\bstart\s+(?:an\s+)?owner\s+session\b/i,
   163|];
   164|
   165|const OWNER_SIGN_OUT_PATTERNS: RegExp[] = [
   166|  /\bsign\s+out\b/i,
   167|  /\blog\s+out\b/i,
   168|  /\blogout\b/i,
   169|  /\bend\s+(?:the\s+)?owner\s+session\b/i,
   170|  /\bclear\s+(?:my\s+|the\s+)?session\b/i,
   171|];
   172|
   173|const OWNER_ACTION_KEYWORDS: RegExp[] = [
   174|  /\bsupabase\s+(?:owner\s+)?action\b/i,
   175|  /\brun\s+(?:an\s+)?owner\s+(?:approved\s+)?action\b/i,
   176|  /\bowner\s+approved\b/i,
   177|  /\bowner\s+command\b/i,
   178|];
   179|
   180|/** Detects an owner sign-in / sign-out request. */
   181|export function resolveOwnerAuthActionIntent(prompt: string): 'owner_sign_in' | 'owner_sign_out' | null {
   182|  const text = normalize(prompt);
   183|  if (!text) return null;
   184|  // Sign-out must be checked before sign-in because "sign out" contains "sign".
   185|  if (OWNER_SIGN_OUT_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => pattern.test(text))) {
   186|    return 'owner_sign_out';
   187|  }
   188|  if (OWNER_SIGN_IN_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => pattern.test(text))) {
   189|    return 'owner_sign_in';
   190|  }
   191|  return null;
   192|}
   193|
   194|/** Detects a generic owner-action / owner-command request (not sign-in/out). */
   195|function isOwnerActionRequest(normalized: string): boolean {
   196|  return OWNER_ACTION_KEYWORDS.some((pattern) => pattern.test(normalized));
   197|}
   198|
   199|/**
   200| * Classify a chat message into exactly one of the five execution branches.
   201| *
   202| * Order matters: clarification/short-circuit intents first, then auth actions,
   203| * then autonomous jobs, then developer execution, then business modules, then
   204| * the general-AI fallthrough. The first matching branch wins.
   205| *
   206| * @param prompt The owner/user prompt text.
   207| * @param hasImageAttachments True when one or more image attachments accompany the message.
   208| */
   209|export function routeIVXChatIntent(
   210|  prompt: string,
   211|  hasImageAttachments: boolean = false,
   212|): IVXChatRouteDecision {
   213|  const normalized = normalize(prompt);
   214|  const planner = buildIVXOwnerAIPlannerDecision(prompt);
   215|  const multimodal = resolveMultimodalRouting(prompt, hasImageAttachments);
   216|
   217|  // ── 1. Short-circuit clarifications (never hijack longer commands) ───────
   218|  const locationIntent = resolveOwnerLocationClarificationIntent(prompt);
   219|  if (locationIntent && !isOwnerExecutionOrTaskBlock(prompt)) {
   220|    return {
   221|      branch: 'general_ai',
   222|      intent: 'location_clarification',
   223|      requiresOwnerSession: false,
   224|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   225|      hint: locationIntent,
   226|      reason: 'Short location clarification; no execution branch.',
   227|      planner,
   228|      multimodal,
   229|    };
   230|  }
   231|
   232|  if (shouldUseCurrentTimeTool(prompt) && !isOwnerExecutionOrTaskBlock(prompt)) {
   233|    return {
   234|      branch: 'general_ai',
   235|      intent: 'time_query',
   236|      requiresOwnerSession: false,
   237|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   238|      hint: 'get_current_time',
   239|      reason: 'Time/date query answered by the time tool.',
   240|      planner,
   241|      multimodal,
   242|    };
   243|  }
   244|
   245|  // ── 2. Owner Actions (auth + owner-gated commands) ──────────────────────
   246|  const authIntent = resolveOwnerAuthActionIntent(prompt);
   247|  if (authIntent) {
   248|    return {
   249|      branch: 'owner_actions',
   250|      intent: authIntent,
   251|      requiresOwnerSession: false,
   252|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   253|      hint: authIntent,
   254|      reason: authIntent === 'owner_sign_in'
   255|        ? 'Owner requested sign-in. Route to Owner Login.'
   256|        : 'Owner requested sign-out. Route to the session-clear flow.',
   257|      planner,
   258|      multimodal,
   259|    };
   260|  }
   261|
   262|  const ownerBackendCommand = resolveOwnerBackendCommandLocal(prompt);
   263|  if (ownerBackendCommand) {
   264|    return {
   265|      branch: 'owner_actions',
   266|      intent: 'owner_backend_command',
   267|      requiresOwnerSession: true,
   268|      mayExecuteSideEffects: true,
   269|      hint: ownerBackendCommand,
   270|      reason: `Owner backend command "${ownerBackendCommand}" routed to the owner-only tool executor.`,
   271|      planner,
   272|      multimodal,
   273|    };
   274|  }
   275|
   276|  const manualAnswerDirective = isOwnerExecutionOrTaskBlock(prompt) ? false : hasManualAnswerDirective(prompt);
   277|  if (manualAnswerDirective) {
   278|    return {
   279|      branch: 'owner_actions',
   280|      intent: 'manual_answer',
   281|      requiresOwnerSession: false,
   282|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   283|      hint: 'manual_answer',
   284|      reason: 'Owner explicitly requested manual/plain-text answer (no tools).',
   285|      planner,
   286|      multimodal,
   287|    };
   288|  }
   289|
   290|  if (isOwnerActionRequest(normalized) && !isOwnerExecutionOrTaskBlock(prompt)) {
   291|    return {
   292|      branch: 'owner_actions',
   293|      intent: 'supabase_owner_action',
   294|      requiresOwnerSession: true,
   295|      mayExecuteSideEffects: true,
   296|      hint: 'supabase_owner_action',
   297|      reason: 'Owner requested a Supabase owner action; requires owner approval.',
   298|      planner,
   299|      multimodal,
   300|    };
   301|  }
   302|
   303|  // ── 3. Autonomous Jobs (durable background tasks) ───────────────────────
   304|  if (asksToImproveIVXToday(prompt)) {
   305|    return {
   306|      branch: 'autonomous_jobs',
   307|      intent: 'daily_self_improvement',
   308|      requiresOwnerSession: true,
   309|      mayExecuteSideEffects: true,
   310|      hint: 'run_ivx_daily_improvement',
   311|      reason: 'Owner issued the daily self-improvement command. Start the autonomous loop.',
   312|      planner,
   313|      multimodal,
   314|    };
   315|  }
   316|
   317|  if (asksForBestOpportunity(prompt)) {
   318|    return {
   319|      branch: 'autonomous_jobs',
   320|      intent: 'opportunity_scan',
   321|      requiresOwnerSession: true,
   322|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   323|      hint: 'opportunity_intelligence',
   324|      reason: 'Owner asked for today\'s best opportunity. Run the opportunity scan engine.',
   325|      planner,
   326|      multimodal,
   327|    };
   328|  }
   329|
   330|  if (asksToFindBestInvestor(prompt)) {
   331|    return {
   332|      branch: 'autonomous_jobs',
   333|      intent: 'best_investor_workflow',
   334|      requiresOwnerSession: true,
   335|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   336|      hint: 'find_best_investor',
   337|      reason: 'Owner asked to find the best investor for a deal. Run the best-investor workflow.',
   338|      planner,
   339|      multimodal,
   340|    };
   341|  }
   342|
   343|  // ── 4. Developer Executor (code/deploy/fix/audit) ───────────────────────
   344|  // Image-first: when an image is attached with an implementation verb, the
   345|  // image is analyzed first and THEN the developer executor runs.
   346|  const isDeveloperExecution =
   347|    planner.route === 'self_developer'
   348|    || isOwnerExecutionOrTaskBlock(prompt)
   349|    || targetsOwnSystemBuild(normalized)
   350|    || isRemovalExecutionPrompt(normalized)
   351|    || demandsExecutionProofNotNarrative(normalized);
   352|
   353|  if (isDeveloperExecution && !asksForDealReview(normalized)) {
   354|    return {
   355|      branch: 'developer_executor',
   356|      intent: 'self_developer_execution',
   357|      requiresOwnerSession: true,
   358|      mayExecuteSideEffects: true,
   359|      hint: 'run_ivx_senior_developer_task',
   360|      reason: 'Owner issued a build/fix/deploy/audit command targeting this system. Route to the Senior Developer Executor.',
   361|      planner,
   362|      multimodal,
   363|    };
   364|  }
   365|
   366|  if (asksForCodeRetrieval(normalized) && !isOwnerExecutionOrTaskBlock(prompt)) {
   367|    return {
   368|      branch: 'developer_executor',
   369|      intent: 'code_retrieval',
   370|      requiresOwnerSession: true,
   371|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   372|      hint: 'search_code',
   373|      reason: 'Owner asked to see real source code. Run a live repo code search.',
   374|      planner,
   375|      multimodal,
   376|    };
   377|  }
   378|
   379|  if (asksForBugReview(normalized)) {
   380|    return {
   381|      branch: 'developer_executor',
   382|      intent: 'bug_review',
   383|      requiresOwnerSession: true,
   384|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   385|      hint: 'code_or_logs',
   386|      reason: 'Owner asked for a bug review. Ground in live code/log context.',
   387|      planner,
   388|      multimodal,
   389|    };
   390|  }
   391|
   392|  if (asksToGenerate3DModel(normalized) && !isOwnerExecutionOrTaskBlock(prompt)) {
   393|    return {
   394|      branch: 'developer_executor',
   395|      intent: 'media_generation_3d',
   396|      requiresOwnerSession: true,
   397|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   398|      hint: 'generate_3d_model',
   399|      reason: 'Owner asked to generate a 3D model. Run the owner 3D generation tool.',
   400|      planner,
   401|      multimodal,
   402|    };
   403|  }
   404|
   405|  // ── 5. Business Modules (deal/landing/grounding/data) ───────────────────
   406|  if (asksForDealReview(normalized)) {
   407|    return {
   408|      branch: 'business_modules',
   409|      intent: 'deal_review',
   410|      requiresOwnerSession: false,
   411|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   412|      hint: 'deal_intelligence',
   413|      reason: 'Owner asked for a deal review. Route to the deal-intelligence business module.',
   414|      planner,
   415|      multimodal,
   416|    };
   417|  }
   418|
   419|  if (resolveLandingInspectionIntent(prompt)) {
   420|    return {
   421|      branch: 'business_modules',
   422|      intent: 'landing_inspection',
   423|      requiresOwnerSession: false,
   424|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   425|      hint: 'inspect_landing_page',
   426|      reason: 'Owner asked about the live landing page / projects. Inspect the live site.',
   427|      planner,
   428|      multimodal,
   429|    };
   430|  }
   431|
   432|  const liveGroundingIntent = resolveLiveGroundingIntent(prompt);
   433|  if (liveGroundingIntent && liveGroundingIntent !== 'time') {
   434|    return {
   435|      branch: 'business_modules',
   436|      intent: 'live_project_state',
   437|      requiresOwnerSession: false,
   438|      mayExecuteSideEffects: false,
   439|      hint: 'live_project_state',
   440|      reason: 'Owner asked for current IVX project/app state. Ground in live runtime context.',
   441|      planner,
   442|      multimodal,
   443|    };
   444|  }
   445|
   446|  // ── 6. General AI (fallthrough) ─────────────────────────────────────────
   447|  // Long structured responses / multi-step plans / normal questions all land here.
   448|  const mediaIntent = resolveMediaAnalysisIntent(prompt);
   449|  if (mediaIntent) {
   450|    return {
   451|      branch: 'general_ai',
   452|      intent: 'media_analysis',
   453|      requiresOwnerSession: false,
